title: C35 E14 2W LED Candle Light Bulbs, Warm White 2700K, SES Filament Small Edison Screw 2W Equivalent 25W Light Bulb, 200LM, Non-Dimmable, 2 Pack
features: 【ENERGY SAVING】This C35 2W LED bulb consumes only 2 watts, equivalent to a 25 watt incandescent bulb, an ideal replacement for halogen or incandescent bulbs, 2W LED Small Edison Screw Candle Bulb saves more than 90% of your lighting electricity bill.
【2700K WARM WHITE LIGHT】Candle shaped E14 screw cap bulb, easy to install, 2W, 200LM, 2700K warm white light, lights up instantly without delay, creates a warm, cosy home atmosphere.
【HIGH QUALITY】Life span up to 25,000 hours. High colour rendering (CRI > 80) provides vivid colours and extra warmth.
【WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATIONS】 The bulbs are commonly used in chandeliers, ceiling fans, wall sconces, kitchen, living room, dining room, coffee shops, hotels, table lamps, and other light fixtures.

【AFTER-SALES SERVICE】 If you need a refund, exchange or have any other questions, please feel free to contact us. We will reply and assist within twenty-four hours. We will provide the best service for our customers. Note: E14 LED bulbs are not dimmable and cannot be used with a dimmer as this will cause the bulb to flicker or make noise.
description: Product Description High CRI (Colour Rendering Index) > 80 LED filament lamps present a vivid and energising light. It will bring beautiful, warm light to your home. Beam angle 330° Emitting 2700K warm white light in 330 degrees, it is the ideal light for living and working places. It emits soft light to create a soft and cosy atmosphere. Flicker Free E14 LED bulbs are flicker free, eliminating eye fatigue. Protect your eyesight, your family's vision will be effectively protected.

specifications_table.Special Features: Energy Efficient, Instant On, Long Lasting
